messages.author: basiccode12
messages.text: Open for discussion/scoping The initial idea for Meshcore signal heatmaps focusses on Rx message signal strength The main goal is to identify meshcore black spots for repeater placement. Mobile or laptop records signal clarity, endpoints, time, location, and attached gear. Data synchronizes to a central node/server once connectivity is available, where it’s blended into heatmap tiles with filtering by time, device, or antenna. The Meshcore app adds a toggleable heatmap layer with adjustable opacity, metric selection, and detailed popups—plus export options for further analysis. Signal data is to be sent to the database either instantaneously or at a random time 12-36 hours after collection for user privacy User can opt out completely Attached image is a concept web app version. Looking for pros/cons/ideas/approch to help build the technical specification (edited)
messages.content_html: Open for discussion/scoping The initial idea for Meshcore signal heatmaps focusses on Rx message signal strength The main goal is to identify meshcore black spots for repeater placement. Mobile or laptop records signal clarity, endpoints, time, location, and attached gear. Data synchronizes to a central node/server once connectivity is available, where it’s blended into heatmap tiles with filtering by time, device, or antenna. The Meshcore app adds a toggleable heatmap layer with adjustable opacity, metric selection, and detailed popups—plus export options for further analysis. Signal data is to be sent to the database either instantaneously or at a random time 12-36 hours after collection for user privacy User can opt out completely Attached image is a concept web app version. Looking for pros/cons/ideas/approch to help build the technical specification (edited)
